headline: Keep the Signal.
Field the Frames.
hero.subheadline: Aboard the Spire, four labs still hold a clean link — Hab, Cryo, Reactor, and Relay. Collect robot Frames, tune precise decks, and trade on a bright market before Static eats the grid.

paragraphs: The Spire's Relay Grid is thinning. A noise called Static crawls through conduits and frost glass, eroding the Signal — the coherent link that lets Hab grow, Cryo hold, Core warm, and Antenna listen.
As Static presses inward, Frames grow unsettled. Operators must not only win their matches, but keep these lab pockets coherent before the last clean channel dissolves into noise.

leaderboard: Seasonal ladder — ranked standings across the four labs.
